models.name: Qwen3.5-4B Q4_K_M (coder)
models.note: RECOMMENDED. Best tiny 2026 coder + tool-caller (Feb 2026). LiveCodeBench 55.8, native function calling, 262K ctx

models.name: Gemma 4 E2B-IT Q4_K_M
models.note: Google 2026 small multimodal + native tool use (Mar 2026). Strong general assistant for weak hardware

models.name: Qwen3.5-2B Q4_K_M
models.note: Fast 2026 coder for iGPUs / weak laptops. Same tool-calling stack as the 4B

models.name: Qwen3.5-0.8B Q4_K_M
models.note: Ultra-tiny 2026 model for phones/edge; full tool-calling. Also the Qwen3.5 speculative-decoding draft

models.name: Qwen3.5-9B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: RECOMMENDED. Best small 2026 all-rounder (Mar 2026). MMLU-Pro 82.5, LiveCodeBench 65.6, first-class tools, 1M ctx

models.name: OmniCoder-9B Q4_K_M (coder)
models.note: Agentic-coding specialist (Mar 2026, Qwen3.5-9B tune). +61% Terminal-Bench vs base; best small coder

models.name: Gemma 4 12B-IT Q3_K_M (dense)
models.note: Google 2026 dense (Jun 2026). Strongest small-tier generalist: LiveCodeBench 72, MMLU-Pro 77.2, multimodal, native tool use, 256K ctx

models.name: Gemma 4 E4B-IT Q4_K_M
models.note: Fast 2026 edge model (Apr 2026). 4.5B effective, multimodal, native function calling, 256K ctx

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-IQ3_S (MoE)
models.note: RECOMMENDED. Top 2026 agentic coder (Apr 2026). 73.4% SWE-bench, 3B active = ~3-5x faster than dense

models.name: Gemma 4 26B-A4B UD-IQ4_NL (MoE)
models.note: Google 2026 MoE (Apr 2026). 3.8B active, LiveCodeBench 80, multimodal, 256K ctx

models.name: Qwen3.5-35B-A3B UD-IQ3_S (MoE)
models.note: Stable Feb-2026 MoE; same 3B-active speed as 3.6, strong coding + tools

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B Q3_K_M (dense)
models.note: Top 2026 dense coder (Apr 2026). 77.2% SWE-bench, highest quality, slower than the MoE

models.name: Gemma 4 31B-IT Q3_K_M (dense)
models.note: Google 2026 dense (Apr 2026). Strongest math/reasoning in this tier, 256K ctx

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-Q4_K_M (MoE)
models.note: RECOMMENDED. The 35B MoE coder at full Q4. Fast (3B active) + high quality

models.name: Gemma 4 26B-A4B UD-Q4_K_XL (MoE)
models.note: Google 2026 MoE at high quant. Multimodal, 256K ctx, fast (3.8B active)

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B Q5_K_M (dense)
models.note: Top dense 2026 coder at high quant. Best quality, slower than the MoE

models.name: Qwen3-Coder-Next 80B-A3B Q4_K_S (MoE)
models.note: RECOMMENDED. 2026 agentic-coding flagship (Feb 2026). 70.6% SWE-bench, 3B active, 256K ctx, 30+ concurrent tool calls

models.name: Mistral Small 4 119B IQ3_XXS (MoE)
models.note: Mistral 2026 unified reasoning + vision + code (Mar 2026). 6.5B active, Apache-2.0, 256K ctx

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-IQ3_S (MoE, MTP)
models.note: Faster 35B MoE: built-in MTP heads (~1.5-2x). 24 GB+ runs full-GPU; on ~16 GB winc offloads experts to keep context. Auto --spec-type draft-mtp

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-Q4_K_M (MoE, MTP)
models.note: The Q4 35B MoE with MTP heads, for 24 GB+ GPUs / 32 GB+ Macs. Auto --spec-type draft-mtp

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B Q3_K_M (dense, MTP)
models.note: The top dense coder with built-in MTP heads (~1.4-2.2x decode) - recovers much of the MoE's speed edge at the 27B's quality. Auto --spec-type draft-mtp

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B Q5_K_M (dense, MTP)
models.note: The Q5 dense 27B with MTP heads, for 24 GB+ GPUs / 32 GB+ Macs. Auto --spec-type draft-mtp

models.name: Qwen3.5-9B Q4_K_M (dense, MTP)
models.note: The small-tier 9B with built-in MTP heads - faster than the external 0.8B draft, nothing extra to download. Auto --spec-type draft-mtp
